The '''''Starlight''-class light freighter''' was a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] produced by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] in conjunction with [[Surron StarTech]]. It proved to be the last design produced by Rendili-Surron.

==Description==
The ''Starlight''-class was designed in the shape of a flying wing, measuring thirty-four [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length. The cockpit was located at one end of the curved wing, with a turret-mounted [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] mounted on the opposite end. The vessel could carry up to four passengers (not including the one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the crew), and fifty [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo. Its interior was very rugged with limited living space.

[[File:BeggarsSolace-Journal5.jpg|thumb|left|100px|''Starlight''-class schematics.]]
